tools.name: get_current_weather
tools.description: Return the current weather conditions for a specified geographic location given by latitude and longitude.

tools.name: get_forecast
tools.description: Return a multi-day weather forecast for a location, including temperature highs, lows, and precipitation probability.

tools.name: list_weather_alerts
tools.description: List active severe-weather alerts issued for a given region by its official region code.
